template.div: Use variable object (or o for brevity) in your expressions. If the user has selected multiple records, the template will be applied to each of them separately, and the resulting files will be delivered as a zip file.

div.p: Use variable docs to iterate through the records selected by the user. Most likely your template should contain something like:

div.class: o_horizontal_separator mt-4 mb-3 text-uppercase fw-bolder small
o_horizontal_separator mt-4 mb-3 text-uppercase fw-bolder small

template.p: Check out the existing demo report templates:

div.class: o_horizontal_separator mt-4 mb-3 text-uppercase fw-bolder small

template.p: For background information, read the documentation of docxtpl which is the library used for templating docx files, and for even more background, read the documentation jinja2, which in turn is used by docxtpl.
